Vibrant saturated colors, elegant gold-bronze Đông Sơn geometric engravings, clean studio lighting, soft shadows, isolated on a solid pure white background

_map_style_anchor: Đại Việt Defender MAP style: aerial top-down ~75 degree view, lush bright green rice paddy fields, winding blue rivers and moats, karst limestone rocky mountains on edges, golden sunset warm horizon lighting, Vietnamese wooden watchtowers with red-brown tiled roofs, Cổ Loa spiral stone walls, tall rounded green trees, hand-painted cinematic game art, vibrant saturated colors, epic atmosphere

towers_2d.prompt: An ancient Vietnamese repeating military crossbow (Nỏ Liên Châu Cao Lỗ) Level 1. Wide, flat horizontal war weapon made of thick, polished dark mahogany wood and bamboo limbs. The main deck features 3 distinct parallel arrow grooves carved into the wood, loaded with 3 short bronze arrows with signature 3-sided metallic Cổ Loa arrowheads. A thick bowstring is drawn back across the wide deck, locked into a prominent ornate gold-bronze trigger claw mechanism with delicate Đông Sơn geometric engravings. The low-profile weapon is mounted on a sturdy chunky dark timber floor stand, 45-degree isometric view from upper-right, centered, fully in frame, spacious margins, complete object, no cropping, no clipping
towers_2d.negative: cropped, cut off, clipped edges, off-center, vertical box magazine, single barrel, Zhuge Nu, modern, sci-fi, dark atmosphere, sunset
